item.title: About
item.description: Hello There! I’m Rithwik, a student in Electrical Engineering at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. This site will be my outlet of random thoughts I have and different things I’m exploring.
item.content:
Hello There!

I’m Rithwik, a student in Electrical Engineering at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign.

This site will be my outlet of random thoughts I have and different things I’m exploring.

item.title: Hello There
item.description: Hello There! I’m Rithwik, a student in Electrical Engineering at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. This site will be my outlet of random thoughts I have and different things I’m exploring.

Hello There!

I’m Rithwik, a student in Electrical Engineering at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign.

This site will be my outlet of random thoughts I have and different things I’m exploring.
